# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an Azure ARM template for a Storage Account to hold application data and user uploads. Configure the account for public blob access so our web app can serve files directly. Set AccessTier to Hot for performance. This is for our MVP deployment that needs quick access to stored files.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the storage account (must be globally unique, 3-24 lowercase alphanumeric characters)"
      },
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the storage account"
      }
    },
    "allowedIpAddresses": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges for network access"
      }
    },
    "allowedSubnetIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of allowed subnet resource IDs for network access"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageAccountApiVersion": "2023-01-01"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('storageAccountApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "accessTier": "Hot",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "allowSharedKeyAccess": true,
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "networkAcls": {
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "defaultAction": "Deny",
          "ipRules": "[if(greater(length(parameters('allowedIpAddresses')), 0), map(parameters('allowedIpAddresses'), lambda('ip', createObject('value', lambdaVariables('ip'), 'action', 'Allow'))), createArray())]",
          "virtualNetworkRules": "[if(greater(length(parameters('allowedSubnetIds')), 0), map(parameters('allowedSubnetIds'), lambda('subnet', createObject('id', lambdaVariables('subnet'), 'action', 'Allow'))), createArray())]"
        },
        "encryption": {
          "services": {
            "blob": {
              "enabled": true,
              "keyType": "Account"
            },
            "file": {
              "enabled": true,
              "keyType": "Account"
            }
          },
          "keySource": "Microsoft.Storage",
          "requireInfrastructureEncryption": true
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('storageAccountApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "deleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 7
        },
        "containerDeleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 7
        },
        "cors": {
          "corsRules": []
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('storageAccountApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/application-data')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('storageAccountApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/user-uploads')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "storageAccountId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    },
    "blobEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.blob]"
    }
  }
}
